scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.sync:frontend: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\同步静态资源.ps1
scripts.sync:admin: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\同步静态资源.ps1 -AdminOnly
scripts.release:local: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\本地发版准备.ps1
scripts.release:local:admin: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\本地发版准备.ps1 -IncludeAdmin
